# 04 Per-residue ΔRRCS for par3_human: # active_minus_inactive: ΔRRCS aggregated across all of a residue's contacts. Positive = net contact gain on activation.
# max_abs_delta: maximum |ΔRRCS| at this residue (the largest single contact change).
# max_signed_delta: signed ΔRRCS at the |Δ|-max contact (preserves sign).
# partner_at_max: partner residue at the |Δ|-max contact (one-letter AA + position).
